description: Representative outbound email templates for campaign simulation. Based on Intercom GTM messaging patterns.

templates.name: ROI-Focused Pitch
templates.subject: Your Zendesk bill is 3x what it should be
templates.body:
Hi {first_name},

I noticed {company} is using Zendesk for customer support with roughly {agent_count} agents. Companies your size typically spend 3x more than needed on support tooling.

Intercom's Fin AI agent resolves 50% of conversations automatically — that's real cost savings without sacrificing quality.

Would a 15-minute demo be worth your time this week?

Best,
{sender_name}

templates.name: Case Study Approach
templates.subject: How [Similar Company] cut support costs 40% with AI
templates.body:
Hi {first_name},

A {industry} company similar to {company} switched from {current_tool} to Intercom last quarter. Results:

- 40% reduction in support costs
- 50% of conversations resolved by Fin AI
- 3-week deployment (not 3 months)

I'd love to share the full case study and discuss what this could look like for {company}.

Open to a quick chat?

{sender_name}

templates.name: Competitive Displacement
templates.subject: Replace Zendesk in 30 days — here's how
templates.body:
Hi {first_name},

I know this sounds aggressive, but we've helped 200+ companies migrate from {current_tool} to Intercom in under 30 days.

The key difference: Fin AI agent handles 50% of conversations from day one. No training period, no ramp-up.

For a {segment} {industry} company like {company}, we typically see:
- 40% cost reduction
- 2x faster first response times
- 90%+ CSAT maintained during transition

Worth exploring?

{sender_name}
